chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. D – 17 of 2026 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of bail application 25.02.2026 Mr. Ali Raza Kanasiro, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Mansoor Ahmed Shaikh, Deputy Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel for the applicant, after arguing the matter at some length, requires that appropriate directions may be issued to the learned trial Court for expeditious proceedings. Learned DPG does not oppose the request so made. Accordingly, learned trial Court is directed to make a sincere attempt to proceed with the case and conclude the same within a period of two months hereof. In case the same is not complied with, the report be submitted. The applicant shall be entitled to file a fresh bail application as per any legal grounds available to him. Bail application stands disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
